message:
fix: Use macos-13-xlarge for darwin-x64 builds

macos-15-large doesn't appear to be available. Using macos-13-xlarge
which is the larger Intel runner still available during the transition period.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             build: npm run build:napi -- --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             platform: linux-arm64-gnu
-          - host: macos-15-large
+          - host: macos-13-xlarge
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             build: npm run build:napi -- --target x86_64-apple-darwin
             platform: darwin-x64
